case_title: MOLINA, JIMMY et al VS C & P AUTO BODY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,210.00 FILED BY MOLINA, JIMMY CACERES, YLADYS AS TO DEFENDANT C & P AUTO BODY BONILLA, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
